title: Better Kelp Visibility
description: Improves kelp visibility by simplifying the kelp texture into a bright solid shape and color. Fully grown kelp becomes easy to spot when it reaches the water surface and stands out above the water.
body:
**Better Kelp Visibility** makes kelp easy to spot in oceans by simplifying the kelp texture into a bright purple solid shape.

This makes it much easier to see kelp from far away and quickly identify areas where kelp has fully grown to the surface.

### Features
* Bright purple kelp for high visibility
* Simplified solid shape for easier spotting
* Fully grown kelp clearly visible when it reaches the water surface

![Kelp visibility from the water surface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30e7342a60185f95334e0b585d9c3db8b673ce14.jpeg)
